
```{python}
import statsmodels.api as sm
import statsmodels.formula.api as smf
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

df = pd.read_csv("../data/model_df.csv")
```

```{python}
print(df["outcome"].value_counts().sort_index())
print(pd.crosstab(
    [df["powerplay"], df["end_grp"], df["score_diff_grp"]],
    df["outcome"]
))
```
```{python}


df = df.dropna(
    subset=[
        
        "h_offensive_shots",
        "h_classified_shots",
        "powerplay",
        "score_diff_grp",
        "end_grp",
        "strength_diff_z",
        "match_id"
    ]
).copy()

df["h_defensive_shots"] = (
    df["h_classified_shots"] - df["h_offensive_shots"]
)
df['off_prop'] = df['h_offensive_shots'] / df['h_classified_shots']

style_glm = smf.glm(
        """
    off_prop ~ powerplay
                                           + C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied'))
                                           + C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
                                           + powerplay:C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied'))
                                           
                                           + strength_diff_z
    """,
    data=df,
    family=sm.families.Binomial(),
    var_weights=df['h_classified_shots'] 
).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": df["match_id"]})


print(style_glm.summary())

```

```{python}
from statsmodels.miscmodels.ordinal_model import OrderedModel
import statsmodels.api as sm
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# --- 1. Prepare the data ---
df_ord = df.dropna(
    subset=["outcome", "powerplay", "score_diff_grp", "end_grp", "strength_diff_z", "match_id"]
).copy()

# Ensure outcome is ordered
df_ord["outcome_ord"] = pd.Categorical(
    df_ord["outcome"],
    categories=["0", "1", "2+"],  # 0 < 1 < 2+
    ordered=True
).codes

ord_model = OrderedModel.from_formula(
    "outcome_ord ~ powerplay * C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied')) \
                   + powerplay * C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6')) \
                   + strength_diff_z",
    data=df_ord,
    distr='logit'
)

ord_result = ord_model.fit(
    method='bfgs',
    maxiter=200,
    cov_type='cluster',
    cov_kwds={'groups': df_ord['match_id']}
)

print(ord_result.summary())

```

```{python}

for col in ["h_before", "h_after", "powerplay"]:
    df[col] = pd.to_numeric(df[col], errors="coerce")

df["h_points_scored"] = df["h_after"] - df["h_before"]

risk_obs = (
    df.dropna(subset=["powerplay", "score_diff_grp", "end_grp", "h_points_scored"])
    .groupby(["powerplay", "end_grp", "score_diff_grp"], as_index=False, observed=False)
    .agg(
        n=("h_points_scored", "size"),
        mean_points=("h_points_scored", "mean"),
        sd_points=("h_points_scored", "std"),
        p0=("h_points_scored", lambda s: (s == 0).mean()),
        p1=("h_points_scored", lambda s: (s == 1).mean()),
        p2plus=("h_points_scored", lambda s: (s >= 2).mean())
    )
)

print(risk_obs.round(3))
```

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from matplotlib.patches import Patch

# --- Global Style Configuration ---
sns.set_theme(style="white")
C_STD, C_PP = "#bdc3c7", "#1a2a6c"
plt.rcParams.update({
    'figure.dpi': 300,
    'font.family': 'sans-serif',
    'axes.labelsize': 12,
    'axes.titlesize': 14,
    'xtick.labelsize': 10,
    'ytick.labelsize': 10,
    'legend.fontsize': 9,
    'legend.title_fontsize': 10,
    'patch.edgecolor': 'black'
})

def get_pred_grid():
    states = [(pp, sd, eg) for eg in ["<=6", ">=7"] 
              for sd in ["leading", "tied", "trailing"] for pp in [0, 1]]
    return pd.DataFrame(states, columns=["powerplay", "score_diff_grp", "end_grp"]).assign(strength_diff_z=0)

# 1. USAGE (Fixed Sorting for Labels)
def plot_usage(df):
    total = df.groupby(["score_diff_grp", "end_grp"], observed=False).size().reset_index(name="N")
    pp = df[df["powerplay"] == 1].groupby(["score_diff_grp", "end_grp"], observed=False).size().reset_index(name="n")
    df_u = pd.merge(total, pp, on=["score_diff_grp", "end_grp"]).assign(rate=lambda x: (x.n/x.N)*100)

    # --- BUG FIX: Match Seaborn Drawing Order ---
    df_u['score_diff_grp'] = pd.Categorical(df_u['score_diff_grp'], categories=["leading", "tied", "trailing"], ordered=True)
    df_u['end_grp'] = pd.Categorical(df_u['end_grp'], categories=["<=6", ">=7"], ordered=True)
    # Seaborn draws hue group 1, then hue group 2
    df_u = df_u.sort_values(['end_grp', 'score_diff_grp'])

    plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
    ax = sns.barplot(data=df_u, x="score_diff_grp", y="rate", hue="end_grp", 
                    palette="viridis", order=["leading", "tied", "trailing"])
    
    # Zip now iterates in the same order Seaborn created the bar 'patches'
    for p, n, r in zip(ax.patches, df_u["n"], df_u["rate"]):
        h = p.get_height()
        if h > 0:
            ax.text(p.get_x()+p.get_width()/2, h+1.5, f'{r:.1f}%', ha='center', weight='bold', fontsize=10)
            ax.text(p.get_x()+p.get_width()/2, h+0.2, f'n={int(n)}', ha='center', va='top', fontsize=8,
                    bbox=dict(facecolor='white', alpha=0.8, edgecolor='none', pad=1))

    plt.ylabel("Deployment Rate (%)"), plt.xlabel("Score Difference")
    plt.ylim(0, df_u.rate.max()+12)
    
    colors = sns.color_palette("viridis", 2)
    handles = [Patch(facecolor=colors[0], label='Ends 1-6'), Patch(facecolor=colors[1], label='Ends 7+')]
    ax.legend(handles=handles, title="Game Phase", loc="upper left", frameon=True)
    
    sns.despine()
    plt.savefig("../manuscript/figures/usage.pdf", bbox_inches='tight')

# 2. STRATEGY (Offensive Rate Prediction)
def plot_strategy(model):
    grid = get_pred_grid()
    grid["rate"] = model.predict(grid) * 100
    grid["Type"] = grid.powerplay.map({0: 'Standard', 1: 'Power Play'})
    
    g = sns.catplot(data=grid, x="score_diff_grp", y="rate", hue="Type", col="end_grp", 
                    kind="bar", palette=[C_STD, C_PP], height=5, aspect=1, order=["leading", "tied", "trailing"])
    
    g.set_axis_labels("Score Difference", "Predicted Offensive Rate (%)").set_titles("End {col_name}")
    g._legend.remove()
    handles = [Patch(facecolor=C_STD, label='Standard'), Patch(facecolor=C_PP, label='Power Play')]
    g.axes[0,0].legend(handles=handles, loc='upper left', title="End Type", frameon=True)
    plt.savefig("../manuscript/figures/strategy.pdf", bbox_inches='tight')

def plot_outcomes(ord_result):
    import pandas as pd
    import seaborn as sns
    import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

    # 1. Prediction grid
    grid = pd.DataFrame(
        [(pp, sd, eg) for pp in [0,1]
                     for sd in ["leading","tied","trailing"]
                     for eg in ["<=6",">=7"]],
        columns=["powerplay","score_diff_grp","end_grp"]
    )
    grid["strength_diff_z"] = 0

    # 2. Predict
    probs = ord_result.predict(grid)

    df_plot = grid.copy()
    df_plot["p0"] = probs.iloc[:, 0]
    df_plot["p1"] = probs.iloc[:, 1]
    df_plot["p2+"] = probs.iloc[:, 2]

    # 3. Compute differences (PP - Standard)
    df_wide = df_plot.pivot_table(
        index=["score_diff_grp","end_grp"],
        columns="powerplay",
        values=["p0","p1","p2+"]
    )

    # Flatten columns
    df_wide.columns = [f"{v}_{pp}" for v, pp in df_wide.columns]

    # Compute deltas
    df_wide["d_p0"]  = df_wide["p0_1"]  - df_wide["p0_0"]
    df_wide["d_p1"]  = df_wide["p1_1"]  - df_wide["p1_0"]
    df_wide["d_p2+"] = df_wide["p2+_1"] - df_wide["p2+_0"]

    df_diff = df_wide.reset_index()

    # 4. Melt
    df_long = df_diff.melt(
        id_vars=["score_diff_grp","end_grp"],
        value_vars=["d_p0","d_p1","d_p2+"],
        var_name="Outcome",
        value_name="Delta"
    )

    df_long["Outcome"] = df_long["Outcome"].map({
        "d_p0": "0 points",
        "d_p1": "1 point",
        "d_p2+": "2+ points"
    })

    # 5. Plot (match your style)
    sns.set_theme(style="white")

    g = sns.catplot(
        data=df_long,
        x="score_diff_grp",
        y="Delta",
        hue="Outcome",
        col="end_grp",
        kind="bar",
        palette="RdYlGn",
        height=5,
        aspect=1,
        edgecolor='black',
        order=["leading","tied","trailing"]
    )

    # Zero reference line (VERY important for interpretation)
    for ax in g.axes.flat:
        ax.axhline(0, color="black", linewidth=1)

    g.set_axis_labels("Score Difference", "Δ Predicted Probability (PP − Standard)")
    g.set_titles("End {col_name}")

    # 1. Choose the same palette as used in the plot
    palette = sns.color_palette("RdYlGn", n_colors=3)  # matches bars

    # 2. Remove seaborn's default legend
    g._legend.remove()

    # 3. Create custom legend with matched colors and outline
    handles = [Patch(facecolor=palette[i], edgecolor='black', label=label) 
            for i, label in enumerate(["0 points", "1 point", "2+ points"])]

    # 4. Add the legend to the first facet
    g.axes[0,0].legend(handles=handles, title="Points Scored", loc="upper left", frameon=True)

    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig("../manuscript/figures/outcomes.pdf", bbox_inches='tight')
    plt.show()

# 4. RISK (Empirical Reward vs. Risk)
def plot_risk(df):
    summary = df.dropna(subset=["h_points_scored","score_diff_grp","end_grp","powerplay"]).groupby(
        ["end_grp","score_diff_grp","powerplay"], observed=False
    ).agg(mean_pts=("h_points_scored","mean"), sd_pts=("h_points_scored","std")).reset_index()
    summary["Type"] = summary.powerplay.map({0: 'Standard', 1: 'Power Play'})

    g = sns.FacetGrid(summary, col="end_grp", height=5, aspect=1, col_order=["<=6", ">=7"])
    
    for i, phase in enumerate(["<=6", ">=7"]):
        subset = summary[summary.end_grp == phase]
        for _, group in subset.groupby("score_diff_grp"):
            g.axes[0, i].plot(group.mean_pts, group.sd_pts, color='black', alpha=0.2, lw=1, zorder=1)

    g.map_dataframe(sns.scatterplot, x="mean_pts", y="sd_pts", hue="Type", style="score_diff_grp", 
                    palette={'Standard': C_STD, 'Power Play': C_PP}, s=150, edgecolors="black", zorder=2)

    g.set_axis_labels("Reward (Mean Points)", "Risk (Std Dev)").set_titles("End {col_name}")
    h, l = g.axes[0,0].get_legend_handles_labels()
    g.axes[0,0].legend(h, l, loc='upper left', title="Context", frameon=True)
    plt.savefig("../manuscript/figures/risk.pdf", bbox_inches='tight')

# --- Run ---
plt.close('all')
plot_usage(df)
plot_strategy(style_glm)
plot_outcomes(ord_result)
plot_risk(df)
```



```{python}
def plot_understanding_histogram(df):
    # Prepare the 'Game Phase' label for the plot
    df_plot = df.copy()
    df_plot['Game Phase'] = df_plot['end_grp'].map({'<=6': 'Early (Ends 1-6)', '>=7': 'Late (Ends 7+)'})
    
    # Use FacetGrid to show Early vs Late side-by-side
    g = sns.FacetGrid(df_plot, col="Game Phase", height=5, aspect=1, col_order=['Early (Ends 1-6)', 'Late (Ends 7+)'])
    
    # Map a countplot to each facet
    g.map_dataframe(sns.countplot, x="score_diff_grp", hue="powerplay", 
                    palette={0: C_STD, 1: C_PP}, order=["leading", "tied", "trailing"])

    # Add labels to the top of every bar
    for ax in g.axes.flat:
        for p in ax.patches:
            if p.get_height() > 0:
                ax.annotate(f'{int(p.get_height())}', 
                            (p.get_x() + p.get_width() / 2., p.get_height()),
                            ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=9, xytext=(0, 3), 
                            textcoords='offset points')
    
    g.set_axis_labels("Score Difference", "Total End Count")
    g.set_titles("{col_name}")
    
    # Add a unified legend
    handles = [Patch(facecolor=C_STD, label='Standard'), Patch(facecolor=C_PP, label='Power Play')]
    g.axes[0,0].legend(handles=handles, title="Strategy", loc="upper left", frameon=True)
    
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

plot_understanding_histogram(df)
```

```{python}

```
